title: agoseris aurantiaca var. purpurea
intro: Agoseris aurantiaca var. purpurea, also known as the Purple Naked-headed Daisy, is a plant species in the sunflower family that produces vibrant purple flowers. The plant is used in herbal medicine due to its purported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. Its health benefits are said to include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems. Traditionally, Agoseris aurantiaca var. purpurea is prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures.
